query:
ALTER TABLE employees 
  ADD COLUMN listaNegraPor varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN listaNegraUserId int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN desligadoPor varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN desligadoUserId int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN dataDesligamentoEfetiva date DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN motivoDesligamento text DEFAULT NULL;
